text.title: Security Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (assets, roles, IAM provider, compliance scope)?

text.example: Inventory: PII + payment tokens. Identity: OIDC + MFA for admin. AuthZ: RBAC, RLS per tenant. Secrets: Vault, 90d rotation. STRIDE: 3 high-severity Tampering threats mitigated by signed events + replay guard. CI: SAST + SCA + gitleaks + tfsec, gate on HIGH. IR: PagerDuty rotation + quarterly tabletop. Spec ready.
